mapper.sql: id, article_name, article_outline, story_background, image_desc, article_type, article_characteristics, article_content, voice_tone, voice_link, voice_file_path, video_link, video_file_path, publish_status, content_generated, total_word_count_estimate, chapter_word_count_estimate, generation_status, res_state, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM article WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND res_state = 1

SELECT
FROM article WHERE article_name = #{articleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND res_state = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO article ( article_name, article_outline, story_background, image_desc, article_type, article_characteristics, article_content, voice_tone, voice_link, voice_file_path, video_link, video_file_path, publish_status, content_generated, total_word_count_estimate, chapter_word_count_estimate, generation_status, res_state, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{articleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{articleOutline,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{storyBackground,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{imageDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{articleType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{articleCharacteristics,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{articleContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{voiceTone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{voiceLink,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{voiceFilePath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{videoLink,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{videoFilePath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{publishStatus,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{contentGenerated,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{totalWordCountEstimate,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{chapterWordCountEstimate,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{generationStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{resState,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.select: SELECT article_name FROM article WHERE article_type = #{articleType,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND res_state = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT
FROM article WHERE (content_generated IS NULL OR content_generated = 0) AND res_state = 1 ORDER BY create_time ASC

SELECT DISTINCT a.id, a.article_name, a.article_outline, a.story_background, a.image_desc, a.article_type, a.article_characteristics, a.article_content, a.voice_tone, a.voice_link, a.voice_file_path, a.video_link, a.video_file_path, a.publish_status, a.content_generated, a.total_word_count_estimate, a.chapter_word_count_estimate, a.res_state, a.create_time, a.update_time FROM article a LEFT JOIN article_chapter ac ON a.id = ac.article_id AND ac.res_state = 1 WHERE a.res_state = 1 AND ac.id IS NULL AND a.total_word_count_estimate IS NOT NULL AND a.chapter_word_count_estimate IS NOT NULL AND a.total_word_count_estimate > 0 AND a.chapter_word_count_estimate > 0 ORDER BY a.create_time ASC
